summary: Tested P0 fixes: (1) Auto-create empresa on /register and (2) BoardReport PDF with charts. Backend: 8/8 tests passed (100%). Frontend: register flow + login + dashboard works end-to-end. BoardReport PDF downloads successfully (~879 KB, valid %PDF header) with NO console errors.

backend_register_auto_company.POST /api/auth/register (company_name on: PASSED - auto-creates company, returns user with role=admin and valid UUID v4 company_id
backend_register_auto_company.POST /api/auth/register (with company_rf: PASSED - registers OK, RFC persisted (uppercase as sent)
backend_register_auto_company.POST /api/auth/register (no company_name: PASSED - returns 400 with detail 'Debes proporcionar el nombre de tu empresa'
backend_register_auto_company.POST /api/auth/register (existing compan: PASSED - reuses existing company, no new company created
backend_register_auto_company.POST /api/auth/login (newly registered): PASSED - returns access_token + user with role=admin
backend_register_auto_company.GET /api/auth/me: PASSED - returns user details correctly with bearer token

frontend_register_flow.register_tab_fields: PASSED - shows Nombre, Email, Contraseña, Nombre de la Empresa (required), RFC (optional). NO 'ID Empresa' field present.
frontend_register_flow.login_after_register: PASSED - newly registered user logs in and lands on Dashboard Ejecutivo with role=admin shown in sidebar
frontend_register_flow.console_errors: PASSED - 0 console errors during register+login flow

frontend_board_report_pdf.buttons_visible: PASSED - export-pdf-btn, export-excel-btn, period-selector all visible
frontend_board_report_pdf.pdf_download: PASSED - downloads 'Reporte_Ejecutivo_COMERCIALIZADORA ORIENTAL TECHNOLOGY_2026-04.pdf' (878,911 bytes), starts with %PDF magic bytes
frontend_board_report_pdf.console_errors_during_pdf: PASSED - 0 'Error exporting PDF' or any error in console after PDF generation (charts via jsPDF helpers drawVerticalBarChart, drawHorizontalBarChart, drawStackedBar, drawSparkline render without runtime errors)

critical_code_review_comments: models/auth.py: UserCreate.password has no min length validation - consider adding constr(min_length=8) for stronger client-side guarantees.

routes/auth.py register(): When company_id is provided, the caller-supplied 'role' is trusted as-is. A malicious user could register as 'admin' joining any existing company by providing role=admin in payload. Recommend forcing role=VIEWER (or requiring an invite token) for self-registrations into existing companies.
routes/auth.py: company_rfc is only uppercased+stripped but no Mexican RFC format validation (12-13 chars, pattern). Acceptable for MVP, but worth flagging.

test_credentials.note: /app/memory/test_credentials.md is MISSING - credentials taken from review_request

seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_/auto-prefixed users + companies during pytest run (timestamp-based unique emails). Not cleaned up. Recommend a cleanup script if test data grows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both P0 tasks verified end-to-end. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_register_auto_company.py (pytest, 8 tests). Key data-testids on Login/Register: register-tab, register-name-input, register-email-input, register-password-input, register-company-input, register-rfc-input, register-submit-button. BoardReport: board-report-page, export-pdf-btn, export-excel-btn, period-selector. PDF generation worked with jsPDF chart helpers (drawVerticalBarChart, drawHorizontalBarChart, drawStackedBar, drawSparkline) - no console errors. NOTE: /app/memory/test_credentials.md does not exist; using admin@demo.com/admin123 from review_request.
